analysis.consistency: High. The description clearly outlines the activation, benefits, charge system, and destruction condition.
analysis.quality: Good. The item has clear, powerful, and specific magical benefits appropriate for its Legendary rarity.

mechanics.activation: Hold for 1 round to reveal inscription (flavor/setup). Passive benefits are active when on person.

benefits.effect: Advantage on saving throws against spells.
Use reaction to change a failed save against a necromancy spell or harmful effect from an undead creature into a success.

mechanics.destruction: The item crumbles upon expending the last charge.

analysis.notes: The mechanics are solid. Advantage on *all* spell saves is significant, and the reaction ability provides crucial defense specifically against common high-level threats (necrotic damage/undead), balancing its overall power slightly by making the charge use reactive and specific. The 12 charges seem appropriate for a legendary item intended to last through several encounters.
